headline: North Texas Food Bank Invites Community to “Taste! At The Star” to Support Children Facing Hunger
summary: Annual culinary fundraiser returns April 17 at the Ford Center at The Star in Frisco Taste! At The Star Logo North Texas Food Bank Invites Community to “Taste! headline: Tyson to close Hillshire Brands plant in Georgia
summary: The meatpacker said recent changes “have made continued operations at the site no longer viable.”
